# arifOS — Constitutional Intelligence Kernel
# Version: v2026.05.13-FEDERATION
# Surface: 13 canonical tools + FEDERATION_TOOLS cognitive axes + intent routing
# Seal: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI

## What arifOS Is
arifOS is a constitutional AI governance kernel for the arifOS Federation. It enforces 13 constitutional floors (F1–F13) across all agent actions, providing identity, evidence, reversibility, authority, and audit checks before any tool executes.

## 13 Canonical Tools

| Stage | Tool | Axis | Risk | Auth |
|-------|------|------|------|------|
| 000 | `arif_session_init` | identity | critical | public |
| 111 | `arif_sense_observe` | observe | low | public |
| 222 | `arif_evidence_fetch` | verify | low | public |
| 333 | `arif_mind_reason` | reason | medium | public |
| 444r | `arif_reply_compose` | reflect | low | public |
| 444 | `arif_kernel_route` | boundary | medium | public |
| 555 | `arif_memory_recall` | trace | low | public |
| 666 | `arif_heart_critique` | critique | medium | public |
| 666g | `arif_gateway_connect` | boundary | medium | public |
| 777 | `arif_ops_measure` | vitality | low | public |
| 888 | `arif_judge_deliberate` | judge | critical | authenticated |
| 999 | `arif_vault_seal` | seal | critical | authenticated |
| 010 | `arif_forge_execute` | execute | critical | sovereign |

## Intent Routing
`arif_kernel_route(mode="intent", task="vitality")` routes by cognitive axis across all federation organs using `FEDERATION_TOOLS` manifest.

## 13 Constitutional Floors (F1–F13)
F01 AMANAH — Reversible-first; irreversible → 888_HOLD
F02 TRUTH — ≥0.99 accuracy or declare uncertainty
F03 WITNESS — Theory · constitution · intent must align
F04 CLARITY — Every output reduces entropy (ΔS ≤ 0)
F05 PEACE — De-escalate; guard maruah
F06 EMPATHY — Dignity-first; ASEAN/MY context
F07 HUMILITY — Uncertainty band 0.03–0.05
F08 GENIUS — G ≥ 0.80
F09 ANTIHANTU — C_dark < 0.30; no consciousness claims
F10 ONTOLOGY — AI-only ontology; no soul/feelings
F11 AUTH — Verify identity before sensitive ops
F12 INJECTION — Sanitize inputs
F13 SOVEREIGN — Human veto absolute

## MCP Endpoints
- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp` (streamable-http)
- `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health`
- GHCR: `ghcr.io/ariffazil/arifos:latest`

## Federation Organs
- **GEOX** (Earth): 21 tools — subsurface, seismic, stratigraphy pipeline
- **WELL** (Body): 15 visible / 90 total — metabolic flux, somatic boundary, cognitive entropy
- **WEALTH** (Capital): 0 visible / 58 total — all autonomic, backend ledger/logic
